title: Wrong sort order
mock_patch:
diff --git a/solution.py b/solution.py
--- a/solution.py
+++ b/solution.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 """Buggy score sorting."""
 
 
 def top_scores(scores: list[int]) -> list[int]:
     """Return the three highest scores."""
-    return sorted(scores)[:3]
+    return sorted(scores, reverse=True)[:3]
